Millstone AI LLM inference sample

ID Model Engine Precision GPU GPU Count VRAM GB Context Tokens Concurrency TTFT ms Decode tok/s Throughput tok/s Methodology Notes
html-qwen Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP vLLM NVFP4 RTX Pro 6000 1 96 32768 4 820 405 410 Prompt cache disabled; no speculative decoding.
html-gemma Gemma-4-31B TensorRT LLM MXFP4 NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell 96GB 1 96 32768 2 700 330 335 Static prompt set.
